wash_trade_concerns: DOGE spot volume on major CEXs (Binance, OKX, Coinbase) appears broadly organic given consistent order-book depth and retail-driven social sentiment cycles, though periodic volume spikes correlated with Elon Musk social media posts warrant caution about short-term manipulation.
rationale: As of early July 2025, Dogecoin's network processes roughly 150,000–200,000 transactions per day according to Blockchair explorer data, reflecting steady but unspectacular on-chain usage. Approximately 72% of circulating DOGE supply has not moved in over 155 days (proxy for long-term holders), consistent with a largely dormant holder base that accumulated during the 2021 and 2023–2024 bull cycles. Precise DAU/MAU figures and granular exchange flow data (USD inflow/outflow) require Glassnode paid tiers or Nansen Pro and are not freely published in recent public blog posts. CoinGecko shows DOGE 24h volume hovering around $800M–$1.2B in late June/early July 2025, with market cap near $26–30B, suggesting the asset remains highly liquid but flow directionality cannot be confirmed without paywalled data.
